id.title: The ID for the dataset version

created_at.description:
When the dataset version was created.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

modified_at.description:
When the dataset version was modified.
The format is https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3339.txt.
Example: "2006-01-02T15:04:05.999999Z".

app_id.description: The app the dataset version belongs to.

user_id.description: The user the dataset version belongs to.

dataset_id.description: The dataset the dataset version belongs to.

annotation_filter_config.description: The dataset version will be generated based on a single annotation filter.

model_predict_config.description: The dataset version will be generated based on model version inferences.

processing_info.description:
Dataset version processing. If this is not set when the dataset version is
created, then the dataset default_processing_info is copied instead. Later
updates to default_processing_info will not apply to existing versions.

metadata.title:
To handle arbitrary json metadata you can use a struct field:
https://github.com/google/protobuf/blob/master/src/google/protobuf/struct.proto

visibility.description:
The visibility field represents whether this message is privately/publicly visible.
To be visible to the public the App that contains it AND the User that contains the App must
also be publicly visible.

embed_model_version_ids.description: The embedding models to return embeddings for. If empty, no embeddings are returned.

request_origin.title:
Read Only. Cannot be Set
Origin of request for new dataset version
